title: retrophyllum comptonii
intro: Retrophyllum comptonii is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, belonging to the family Podocarpaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, with its bark and leaves exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Retrophyllum comptonii include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Retrophyllum comptonii can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation.
